docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,420.42 FILED BY BROSSMAN,JR, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED APR-10-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-09-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BROSSMAN,JR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH HAS NOT BEEN FILED AND IS INVALID. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE CLAIM TO THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE PURSUANT TO THE SERVICE INFORMATION LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE FOR DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
